'''Plixon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Indobok Pirates]]. Formerly a [[Chef/Legends|cook]] along with the rest of the gang, he was forced to work in a [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] [[Mining/Legends|mine]] after [[Olag Greck]] framed the chefs for an attempted [[Poison/Legends|poisoning]] of [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. After escaping the mine, he and [[Bixon]] helped steal the ''[[Tharen Wayfarer]]'' from the [[Pitareeze family]].
